schema.title: Response Get Meta V1 Meta Get

200.description: Exported file streamed as an attachment.

get.description:
Return the latest daily recommendations.

Pro+ feature gated via ensure_forecasting_access.

Return recent pipeline run history (Pro+ gated).

Pipeline runs are system-wide (not user-scoped) since they represent
shared nightly scanning results.  Access is gated by forecasting
entitlement.

Supports optional cursor-based pagination via the ``cursor`` parameter
which should be the ``created_at`` ISO timestamp of the last item from
the previous page.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: created_at ISO cursor from previous page
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: created_at ISO cursor from previous page

post.description: Create and enqueue a single-symbol deep analysis (Pro+ gated).

get.description: List recent analyses for the current user.
Get full analysis results (for polling and display).

strategy_overrides.description: Optional overrides for strike placement and spread width

CurrentUserResponse.title: CurrentUserResponse
CurrentUserResponse.description:
Response schema for the authenticated user endpoint.

``features`` and ``usage`` are computed fields that do not correspond to
database columns on the User model.  Callers must construct this response
explicitly (see ``BacktestService.to_current_user_response``) rather than
passing an ORM User object directly — ``from_attributes`` is enabled only
for the flat scalar fields inherited from the User row.

strike_offset.title: Strike Offset
strike_offset.description: Strike offset from ATM in listed-strike steps. 0=ATM, +1=one OTM call step, -1=one OTM put step.

CustomLegDefinition.title: CustomLegDefinition
CustomLegDefinition.description: User-defined leg for custom N-leg strategies.

DailyPickForecast.title: DailyPickForecast
DailyPickForecast.description: Known keys produced by the forecaster for daily pick forecasts.

DailyPickSummary.title: DailyPickSummary
DailyPickSummary.description: Known keys produced by the backtest engine for daily pick summaries.

probabilistic_note.title: Probabilistic Note
probabilistic_note.default: This range is probabilistic, derived from historical analog setups, and is not financial advice or a certainty of future results.

SpreadWidthConfig.title: SpreadWidthConfig
SpreadWidthConfig.description: Configuration for how wide a spread's wings are.

SpreadWidthMode.title: SpreadWidthMode
SpreadWidthMode.description: How to determine the width of a spread (distance between short and long strikes).

long_call_strike.description: Override long call placement (for diagonals, PMCC)

spread_width.description: Override wing/spread width for strategies with protection legs

StrategyOverrides.title: StrategyOverrides
StrategyOverrides.description:
Optional overrides for how a strategy selects strikes and widths.

Named fields correspond to standard leg roles. Strategies ignore fields
that don't apply to them (e.g., a long call ignores ``short_call_strike``).

value.title: Value
value.description: Interpretation depends on mode: pct_from_spot → percentage, atm_offset_steps → integer steps, delta_target → absolute delta (0-100).

StrikeSelection.title: StrikeSelection
StrikeSelection.description: Configuration for where a strategy leg's strike is placed relative to the underlying.

StrikeSelectionMode.title: StrikeSelectionMode
StrikeSelectionMode.description: How to choose a strike for a strategy leg.

TemplateConfig-Input.title: TemplateConfig
TemplateConfig-Input.description: The reusable portion of a backtest configuration — everything except symbol and dates.

TemplateConfig-Output.title: TemplateConfig
TemplateConfig-Output.description: The reusable portion of a backtest configuration — everything except symbol and dates.
